sections.markdown:
- Activity: Lunch Run
- Started: 2025-08-09 11:58
- Distance: 7.8 km
- Moving time: 43:54
- Elapsed time: 46:57
- Elevation gain: 153.6 m
- Average heart rate: 168.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 183 bpm
- Average watts: 225.7 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `40` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `140.6 bpm`, ranging from `129.0` to `175.4 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `139.8 bpm` and second-half average HR was `175.4 bpm` (+35.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `159.2 spm`, with a working range of `110.7` to `173.6 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `147.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `171.2 spm` (+24.0 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:38 /km` across `7.783 km` in `43:54` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:55 /km` and second-half pace was `5:21 /km` (-34 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `168.6 bpm` average and `183 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `162.0 bpm` in the first half and `174.6 bpm` in the second (+12.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `43:54` out of `46:57` elapsed (93.5%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `11` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `159.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `37.4 m` and `65.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `69.0 m` in the first half and `90.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
